descriptions.text:
Pokémon: Dreamstone Mysteries is a fan-made RPG that drops players into the unexplored region of Cormoria. The place is packed with wild environments—think freezing peaks, lava-filled craters, and shadowy wetlands. The goal? Track down the missing Professor Tenebris while fending off Team Somber, a shady group after the powerful Dreamstones.

This isn’t just another Pokémon game. The story digs deeper, mixing classic monster-catching with mystery and exploration. There are around 300 Pokémon from different generations, plus smoother battles and cleaner visuals. Whether you’re new or a longtime player, it blends nostalgia with fresh twists.

Welcome to the region of Cormoria, a diverse landmass defined by its extreme environments, from the freezing peaks of Mt. Mirroh to the lava-filled craters of Mt. Ceram. As a fledgling trainer, your journey begins not with the traditional elemental trio, but with a unique choice between Gothita, Timburr, and Galarian Zigzagoon. The adventure takes a sudden, dark turn when the region’s leading researcher, Professor Tenebris, vanishes under suspicious circumstances shortly after discovering the mysterious "Dreamstones"—artifacts rumored to hold the power to bridge reality and the realm of dreams.

To uncover the truth behind the Professor's disappearance, you must team up with the region's secret services and investigate the activities of Team Somber. This enigmatic criminal organization is determined to seize the Dreamstones to awaken an "Ancient Terror"—the legendary Pokémon Koraidon—and reshape the world according to their twisted vision. Your quest will force you to navigate a complex web of mysteries that transcends time itself, sending you traveling into the distant past to prevent a catastrophe that threatens Cormoria's future.

As you pursue Team Somber across the region, you must also prove your strength in the traditional Gym Challenge. You will face off against powerful Gym Leaders, including your own rival, Kohla, who serves as a Gym Leader at the Detective Academy. The journey culminates in a high-stakes tournament at the Pokémon League, where you must master the power of Mega Evolution and the Dreamstones to rescue Professor Tenebris and stop Team Somber before their ancient doomsday prophecy comes to pass.
